name: Village Pizza
tagline: Order your favorite pizza, pasta, salad, and more — all with the click of a button

about: Village Pizza is a beloved neighborhood pizza shop located at 23 Ella Grasso Turnpike in Windsor Locks, Connecticut. Known for their hand-tossed pizzas, hearty Italian dinners, and wide selection of grinders and specialties, they offer convenient online ordering with both delivery and pickup options. Open late-night hours, Village Pizza is the go-to spot for a satisfying meal any time of day.

designBrief.colorDirection: light palette, clean whites, sage green, soft terracotta accents
designBrief.inspiration: Modern minimalist counter-service pizza. Clean lines, not sit-down Italian.
designBrief.avoidance: No dark/heavy Italian themes (that's Family Pizzeria). No rustic textures. Must not reuse fonts from other sites in this project.
designBrief.heroStyle: Bright, light background, minimal text, modern sans-serif display
designBrief.uniqueElement: Animated menu category tabs or ingredient highlight carousel
